# Bilag

Se samtykkedokumentet her: [Samtykkedokument](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1WSwm5VS4rqMGf88sh83JyY22WKnNq_FZ/view?usp=sharing).

Se skriftlig deltagerinformation her: [Skriftlig deltagerindformation](https://drive.google.com/file/d/16lk3qCFOK0lUSFcKux80OKlYnl0a97NZ/view?usp=sharing).



::: text-center
![](/images/rm-logo.png){width=200px}
:::
